commands.review_summary:
Threads embedded-run `terminalError` into run metadata/lifecycle handling and maps `non_deliverable_terminal_turn` to a specific user-facing failure message with a focused auto-reply regression test.

PR surface: Source +46, Tests +38. Total +84 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main records `terminalError` in trajectory artifacts but does not carry it into `runResult.meta`, while the linked issue provides a live Telegram 2026.6.8 symptom report. I did not run a live Telegram reproduction in this read-only review.
